title: deguelia marginata
intro: Deguelia marginata, also known as the Guanacaste tree, is a plant species native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Deguelia marginata include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and anti-viral properties. Deguelia marginata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
